global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on travel booking.
global.main_message: Promoting travel bookings with special fares.

elements.label: Light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the other elements.

elements.label: RouteBloom logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo for 'RouteBloom' in a prominent position, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Two simple circular shapes, one small and one larger, are placed in the background, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Large, bold text stating 'Book your next trip' is centrally positioned, conveying the primary message.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Special fares today

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: A bright yellow badge with the text 'SALE' is positioned at the top, drawing attention to the promotion.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent black button with white text saying 'Order now' is located at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' is positioned at the top, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold accents, RouteBloom logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the logo is at the top, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip, Special fares today, RouteBloom SALE, Order now, UGC
